results.title: ‘Genuine human error...’: Ram Charan apologises after calling Jasprit Bumrah a footballer
results.description: Actor Ram Charan has apologised to Indian cricketer Jasprit Bumrah after mistakenly referring to him as a footballer during an event of ‘Peddi’ in Bhopal. The actor’s back-to-back slip-ups at the event have quickly gone viral on social media, triggering widespread reactions online. The Bhopal event for the upcoming film was held on Saturday and [...]

results.title: Hyderabad Traffic Diversion
results.description: హైదరాబాద్ మెహదీపట్నం, పీవీఎన్ఆర్ ఎక్స్‌ప్రెస్‌వే పరిసరాల్లో మే 24, 25 తేదీల్లో భారీగా ట్రాఫిక్ ఆంక్షలు విధించారు. స్కైవాక్ పనుల నేపథ్యంలో పోలీసులు ప్రకటించిన పూర్తి రూట్ మ్యాప్, హెల్ప్‌లైన్ నంబర్ వివరాలు వెల్లడించారు.

results.title: 'Slow Poison’: Arvind Kejriwal Explodes Over Fuel Hikes, Warns Petrol May Hit Rs 150
results.description: Fuel prices in India have surged for the third time in 15 days, increasing by Rs 4 to Rs 5 per litre, alongside a significant rise in gas cylinder costs. Amidst fuel shortages and long lines at petrol stations, Aam Aadmi Party leader Arvind Kejriwal criticised the central government for these hikes, labelling them as a “slow poison.”

results.title: "World May Get Some Good News In Next Few Hours": Marco Rubio On US-Iran Deal
results.description: Marco Rubio said the emerging peace deal would address concerns on the Strait of Hormuz.

results.title: Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari Warns People Against Stepping Out After 11 AM
results.description: #ପ ୍ରବଳ_ଖରା #୧୧ଟ ାରେ_ପରେ_ଘରୁ_ବାହାରନି ପ୍ରବଳ ଖରାକୁ ନେଇ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ରାଜସ୍ବମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୁରେଶ ପୂଜାରୀଙ୍କ ପରାମର୍ଶ ୧୧ଟାରେ ପରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରନି। ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ଯାଏଁ ଶ୍ରମିକମାନେ ବାହାରେ କାମ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ମନା ରହିଛି। ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଅତି ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ସ୍ଥଳେ ୧୧ଟାରୁ ୩ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବାହାରକୁ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି ପାଣି, ଓଦା ଗାମୁଛା ଆଦି ନେଇକି ଯାଆନ୍ତୁ। ୨ ତାରିଖ ଯାଏଁ ଏମିତି ଖରା ରହିବ। Revenue Minister Suresh Pujari has advised people not to step out of their homes after 11 AM due to the prevailing severe heatwave conditions. He said labourers have been prohibited from working outdoors between 11 AM and 3 PM as part of precautionary measures. People going out for urgent work during these hours have been advised to carry drinking water and a wet Gamucha (traditional cotton towel) to avoid heat-related illness. According to the minister, the intense heat conditions are likely to continue till the 2nd. The advisory has been issued to ensure public safety amid rising temperatures and harsh summer conditions across the state. #HeatwaveAlert_SureshPujari #OdishaHeatwave #SummerSafety #HeatwaveWarning #ExtremeHeat #WorkerSafety #PublicAdvisory #OdishaNews #HeatwavePrecaution_Odisha #OutdoorWorkBan_Odisha #SureshPujari_HeatAlert #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: India News | MP: Red Alert Continues in Chhatarpur Amid Extreme Heatwave
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. A red alert for heatwaves remains continuously active in the Chhatarpur district of Madhya Pradesh on Sunday, with the temperature crossing 41°C since early morning.

results.title: US overtakes Mauritius to become India’s 2nd largest FDI source as inflows cross $11 billion mark
results.description: The investment landscape is changing. The United States has now claimed the title of India's second-largest foreign investor, overtaking Mauritius. Equity infusions from America more than doubled to exceed $11 billion during the 2025-26 period. While Singapore holds the crown, sectors such as food processing, computer hardware, and shipping are experiencing exciting development.

results.title: Gulveer Singh shatters national record in men’s 5000m with silver at Sound Running LA Track Fest
results.description: Gulveer Singh is the first Indian distance runner to hold multiple national records across events ranging from the 3,000m on the track to the 25km road race.
